_comments.Logging: Logging configuration. Set LogLevel.Default to 'Debug' for development, 'Warning' for production.
_comments.DashboardDataPath: Path to data.json file relative to application root. Default: ./wwwroot/data/data.json. Can be absolute path.
_comments.AllowRemoteAccess: Allow dashboard access from remote machines. Set to true for network deployment. Default: false (localhost only).
_comments.Port: Port number for Kestrel to listen on. Default: 5000. Must match Kestrel endpoint URL.
_comments.Kestrel: Web server configuration. Default binds to all interfaces (0.0.0.0) for internal network access.
